center.name: 康塞普西翁省 (智利)
center.summary: 康塞普西翁省 (智利)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Patagonian forest earthcreeper，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Patagonian forest earthcreeper is found in central Chile between Concepción and Valdivia provinces and in western Argentina between Neuquén and Chubut provinces

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Patagonian forest earthcreeper is found in central Chile between Concepción and Valdivia provinces and in western Argentina between Neuquén and Chubut provinces
